rows.description: Soluta varia
rows.notes: Consensus reached on values and type; description adopted from gemini-flash for exact match with image ('Soluta varia' without a trailing period).
Consensus reached on all values and type.

rows.description: Novr 7. Civitate Oxon Due Mich: 1764.
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash values. Visual verification confirms 'Novr 7.' for the date and '16' shillings. gpt-5-mini misread the date as 'Novr 27.' and shillings as '15'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the city of Oxford for dues payable at Michaelmas 1764.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the city of Oxford for dues payable at Michaelmas 1764, amounting to £3 16s 8d.

rows.description: 29. Sermon 5th Octr 1764.

rows.english_description: Payment for a sermon preached on 5 October 1764.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for a sermon preached on 5 October 1764, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus reached on all values and type. gemini-flash provided an excellent note on potential ambiguity of '7' vs '9' and its clear resolution.
